_note: Remote QNE backend run. Honest general. Roles mapped onto rotterdam / amsterdam / the-hague; end-to-end entanglement was established via MULTI-HOP entanglement swapping across channels delft-rotterdam, delft-the-hague, leiden-the-hague, amsterdam-leiden. The full instruction trace is trimmed here to the decisive round_result and the classical-message phase.
routing_note: The general<->lieutenant and lieutenant<->lieutenant entangled pairs were NOT direct links. The backend built them through intermediate nodes via entanglement swapping. The application code was unchanged and topology-agnostic -- the network layer handled multi-hop routing transparently.
